name: Hallucination Detector
description: Scores AI-generated text for likely hallucinated facts. Detects fabricated precision, invented citations, temporal impossibilities, hedged authority, entity confusion, and overconfident absolutes. Returns a 0-1 risk score with detailed signals. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).

authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: detect_hallucinations
tools.description: Scores AI-generated text for likely hallucinated facts. Detects fabricated precision, invented citations, temporal impossibilities, hedged authority, entity confusion, and overconfident absolutes.

text.description: The AI-generated text to analyze for hallucination signals

score.description: Hallucination risk score from 0 (low risk) to 1 (high risk)

verdict.description: Risk verdict based on score thresholds

flagged_count.description: Sentences containing at least one signal
